class.note: Mantiene los tipos de Competencias que pueden tener las Comeptencias asociadas a una Persona\\
class.help: Mantiene los tipos de Competencias que pueden tener las Comeptencias asociadas a una Persona
class.label: Nivel Competencia
class.name: NIVEL_COMP

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_nivel_comp as oi_nivel_comp, t0.c_nivel_comp as c_nivel_comp, t0.d_nivel_comp as d_nivel_comp, SEC.policy, t0.c_nivel_comp as CODE, t0.d_nivel_comp as TEXT FROM PER36_NIVELES_COMP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Niveles_Competencias.NIVEL_COMP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_nivel_comp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_nivel_comp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_nivel_comp as oi_nivel_comp, SEC.policy FROM PER36_NIVELES_COMP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Niveles_Competencias.NIVEL_COMP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_nivel_comp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_nivel_comp asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de Tipo de Domicilio. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código
attribute.name: c_nivel_comp

attribute.description: Descripción de Tipo de Domicilio. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_nivel_comp

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Niveles_Competencias.NIVEL_COMP.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Niveles_Competencias.NIVEL_COMP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PER36_NIVELES_COMP.oi_nivel_comp) as CNT from PER36_NIVELES_COMP Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER36_NIVELES_COMP.oi_nivel_comp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER36_NIVELES_COMP.d_nivel_comp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER36_NIVELES_COMP.c_nivel_comp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
